TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Roland_Trebicka, title = Roland_Trebicka, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Roland_Trebicka} }

S.FORM: Roland Trebicka kawas tay 1947, Roland Trebicka, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2013) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Roland Trebicka kawas tay 1947, Roland Trebicka, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2013) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: rolan* treβiʦ~ʨka kawas~ɕ taj ****, rolan* treβiʦ~ʨka, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
